summary: LOD and LOQ are not the same; LOD refers to the lowest concentration detectable above background noise while LOQ represents the lowest level at which accurate and precise quantitation can be achieved. These distinctions are fundamental in analytical chemistry for ensuring valid interpretation of test results.
